name: Madras Chicken Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine nonfat yogurt and chutney until well blended; set aside.
2. Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat.
3. Add onion, bell pepper, celery, and apples to the skillet. Cook until the onion is soft but not browned.
4. Stir in curry powder; cook for one minute.
5. Add chicken and cook for three minutes or until heated through.
6. Stir in the yogurt and chutney mixture; cook for an additional minute.
7. Remove the skillet from heat, keeping it warm.
8. Toast hamburger buns.
9. Spoon half a cup of the chicken mixture onto each bun.
10. Makes 4 sandwiches.
Note: I prefer to serve this over hot cooked egg noodles or fettuccine.
